ast.name: error
ast.source: There was an error creating the tweet directory.

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在加载推文转 Markdown 功能

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在清理笔记位置设置。

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在清理资源位置设置。

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在卸载推文转 Markdown 功能

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to store the created notes. You can use the placeholders [[handle]], [[name]], [[text]] and [[id]]. Defaults to the root of the vault.
ast.target: 存储创建笔记的位置。您可以使用占位符 [[handle]]、[[name]]、[[text]] 和 [[id]]。默认为保险库的根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include images in the generated markdown.
ast.target: 在生成的 Markdown 中包含图片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a custom size for images. Enter just the width (e.g. 200) or the width and height (e.g. 200x300).
ast.target: 设置图片的自定义尺寸。仅输入宽度（例如 200）或宽度和高度（例如 200x300）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to store the downloaded images. You can use the placeholders [[handle]], [[name]], [[text]] and [[id]]. Defaults to `assets/`.
ast.target: 存储下载图片的位置。您可以使用占位符 [[handle]]、[[name]]、[[text]] 和 [[id]]。默认为 `assets/`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Embed images in markdown style or Obsidian style. Obsidian style will only work if you download images.
ast.target: 以 Markdown 风格或 Obsidian 风格嵌入图片。Obsidian 风格仅在您下载图片时有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name to give the saved tweet file. You can use the placeholders [[handle]], [[name]], [[text]] and [[id]]. Defaults to "[[handle]] - [[id]]"
ast.target: 保存推文文件的名称。您可以使用占位符 [[handle]]、[[name]]、[[text]] 和 [[id]]。默认为 \"[[handle]] - [[id]]\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How (or whether) to open the tweet once it is finished downloading.
ast.target: 下载完成后如何（或是否）打开推文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults to downloading a tweet thread instead of a single tweet. This option can still be toggled on the tweet download window This does not apply to pasted tweets.
ast.target: 默认下载推文线程而非单条推文。此选项仍可在推文下载窗口中切换。此设置不适用于粘贴的推文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For tweet threads, only show author information on the first tweet in the thread (or if a new author appears).
ast.target: 对于推文线程，仅在线程的第一条推文中显示作者信息（或当出现新作者时）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include tweet metadata such as  author, original link, and metrics (likes, retweets, &c.) as a frontmatter block.
ast.target: 将推文元数据（如作者、原始链接和指标（点赞、转发等））作为前置信息块包含在内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A space-separated list of tags you'd like to include in the frontmatter.
ast.target: 您希望包含在前置信息中的、以空格分隔的标签列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A `cssclass` field to include in the frontmatter. Obsidian will apply this class to tweet notes for CSS styling.
ast.target: 包含在前置信息中的 `cssclass` 字段。Obsidian 将应用此类别到推文笔记以进行 CSS 样式设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent hashtags from being included in Obsidian tags (change # to \#)
ast.target: 防止主题标签被包含在 Obsidian 标签中（将 # 更改为 \\#）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the profile image of the tweet author in the saved tweet.
ast.target: 在保存的推文中包含推文作者的头像图片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a custom size for avatar images. Enter just the width (e.g. 200) or the width and height (e.g. 200x300).
ast.target: 设置头像图片的自定义尺寸。仅输入宽度（例如 200）或宽度和高度（例如 200x300）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include user profile and original tweet links in the generated markdown.
ast.target: 在生成的 Markdown 中包含用户资料和原始推文链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the tweet date next to the author's name.
ast.target: 在作者姓名旁边包含推文日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format to display the tweet timestamp.
ast.target: 显示推文时间戳的格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The locale to apply to the date format
ast.target: 应用于日期格式的区域设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the name of the file. You can use the placeholders [[handle]], [[name]], [[text]], and [[id]].
ast.target: 设置文件的名称。您可以使用占位符 [[handle]]、[[name]]、[[text]] 和 [[id]]。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the URL of the tweet to download.
ast.target: 输入要下载的推文 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download a tweet thread. (Put the link to the LAST tweet in the thread).
ast.target: 下载推文线程。（请提供线程中最后一条推文的链接）。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: API 密钥或 Bearer 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Twitter bearer token was not found.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There was an error downloading the images.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: One of the tweets in this thread is unavailable to be viewed. Download failed.
ast.target: 此主题中的某条推文无法查看。下载失败。
